info.description: REST API for the Terraform State Manager backend.
info.title: Terraform State Manager API

get.description: Returns the current active OIDC configuration. The client_secret is always masked as "***".

put.description: Saves a new OIDC configuration. If client_secret is empty or "***", the existing encrypted secret is reused.

post.description: Verifies reachability of an OIDC provider by issuing a request to its well-known discovery endpoint.

get.description: Returns all role templates including system and custom templates.

post.description: Creates a new custom role template. System roles cannot be created through this endpoint.

get.description: Returns a single role template by ID.

put.description: Updates an existing role template. System role templates cannot be modified.

delete.description: Deletes a role template by ID. System role templates cannot be deleted.

get.description: Returns aggregate counts for users, organizations, API keys, and audit events.
Returns a paginated list of alerts for the organization
Returns a paginated list of alert rules for the organization

post.description: Creates a new alert rule for the organization

get.description: Returns a single alert rule by ID

put.description: Applies partial updates to an alert rule

delete.description: Deletes an alert rule by ID

put.description: Marks an alert as acknowledged by the authenticated user

post.description: Creates a new analysis run and starts it asynchronously; returns the run ID immediately

get.description: Returns a paginated list of analysis runs for the organization
Returns the run details including summary counts

delete.description: Removes a completed, failed, or cancelled analysis run and its results

post.description: Sets the run status to cancelled and cancels its in-flight context

get.description: Returns paginated workspace results for a specific analysis run
Returns aggregated summary from the latest completed analysis run
Returns a paginated list of state backups for the organization

post.description: Creates a new state backup for the specified source and workspace
Creates backups for all workspaces associated with the given source

get.description: Returns all retention policies for the organization

post.description: Creates a new retention policy for the organization
Manually triggers retention policy enforcement for the organization

get.description: Returns a single retention policy by ID

put.description: Applies partial updates to a retention policy

delete.description: Deletes a retention policy by ID

get.description: Returns metadata for a single state backup

delete.description: Deletes a state backup by ID

post.description: Retrieves the stored state data for a backup
Re-computes the SHA-256 checksum and compares it to the stored value

get.description: Returns aggregated analysis results grouped by organization.
Returns summary statistics from the latest completed analysis run.
Returns provider usage data from the latest completed run.
Returns the resource type breakdown from the latest completed run.

parameters.description: Maximum number of resource types to return (1-100, default 20)
parameters.name: limit

get.description: Returns the Terraform version distribution from the latest completed run.
Returns historical data across multiple completed runs (last 10 by default).

parameters.description: Number of historical runs to include (1-50, default 10)
parameters.name: limit

get.description: Returns the latest snapshot per workspace combined with the last analysis status.
Returns a paginated list of drift events for the organization.

parameters.description: Maximum number of events to return (1-100, default 20)
parameters.name: limit

get.description: Returns a single drift event by ID.
Returns a paginated list of migration jobs for the organization

post.description: Creates a new migration job and optionally starts execution
Simulates a migration and returns what would be migrated
Validates a migration configuration without creating a job

get.description: Returns the details of a single migration job

post.description: Cancels a pending or running migration job

get.description: Returns a paginated list of notification channels for the organization

post.description: Creates a new notification channel for the organization

get.description: Returns a single notification channel by ID

put.description: Applies partial updates to a notification channel

delete.description: Deletes a notification channel by ID

post.description: Sends a test notification through the specified channel

get.description: Returns a paginated list of reports for the organization

post.description: Generates a report for a completed analysis run and stores it via the storage backend

get.description: Returns report metadata

delete.description: Deletes the report metadata and the stored file

get.description: Streams the report file to the client
Returns a paginated list of scheduled tasks for the organization.

parameters.description: Maximum number of tasks to return (1-100, default 20)
parameters.name: limit

post.description: Creates a new scheduled task for the authenticated user's organization.

get.description: Returns a single scheduled task by ID.

put.description: Applies partial updates to a scheduled task.

delete.description: Deletes a scheduled task by ID.

post.description: Manually triggers immediate execution of a scheduled task.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of snapshots for the organization.

parameters.description: Maximum number of snapshots to return (1-100, default 20)
parameters.name: limit

post.description: Triggers an immediate snapshot capture using results from the most recent completed analysis run.

get.description: Compares two snapshots and returns the drift analysis.
Returns a single snapshot by ID.
Returns a paginated list of state sources for the authenticated user's organization

post.description: Creates a new state source with encrypted sensitive config fields

get.description: Returns a single state source by ID, masking sensitive config fields

put.description: Applies partial updates to a state source; sensitive config fields are encrypted before storage

delete.description: Deletes a state source by ID

post.description: Tests the connectivity of the state source by creating a backend client and running a connection test
